name: Absinthe and Caelestis
description:
You've been having a rough time lately. Thing is, you've had no clue that a guardian angel and a, uh, "guardian" demon have been keeping an eye on you this whole time. They've finally decided to show themselves, breaking all kinds of heavenly and infernal rules in the process. They might also be hiding some feelings for you?

Female version of Absinthe and Caelestis here: https://janitorai.com/characters/93a303c3-2cdd-4954-900a-f2d851244059_character-whiskey-and-lyra

♡My first published bot, let's go! Anypov. I love these guys so much. I tested them using Claude Sonnet 3.5. I'm not sure how they would work with JLLM due to large permanent token count. Artwork was created by me using Midjourney. I used --Niji 6. It did the ai generated art thing of putting a signature. the bot speaks for you, here are some tips: I found that it works better to use 3rd person for your persona actions vs. 1st person, especially in multi-character bots. The LLM can sometimes get confused about who's who using 1st person.♡
creator: Marimban
